productSummary: Premium home goods and lifestyle brand selling direct-to-consumer across Europe. Operates both online store and wholesale B2B channel.

knownTeams.name: Customer Care
knownTeams.description: Handles order inquiries, returns, shipping issues, and product questions

knownTeams.name: Sales & Partnerships
knownTeams.description: B2B wholesale inquiries, retail partnerships, and bulk orders

knownTeams.name: VIP Support
knownTeams.description: Dedicated support for loyalty program members and high-value customers

knownTeams.name: Social Commerce
knownTeams.description: Manages Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp shopping conversations

currentSetup.primaryUseCase: Omnichannel customer support with social commerce conversion
topPainPoints: Social channels have low conversion tracking
B2B and B2C inquiries mixed in same queues

suggestedPreviewContext: Focus on channel-level performance, conversion tracking across social commerce, and separating B2B from B2C support metrics.
